PostToolUse.command: filepath="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$filepath" == */frontend/* && ("$filepath" == *.ts || "$filepath" == *.tsx || "$filepath" == *.js || "$filepath" == *.jsx) ]]; then cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/frontend" && npx eslint --fix "$filepath" 2>/dev/null; fi

PreToolUse.command: filepath="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$filepath" == *.env || "$filepath" == *.env.* || "$filepath" == *credentials* || "$filepath" == *package-lock.json ]]; then echo 'BLOCKED: Cannot edit .env, credentials, or lock files directly. Ask the user to make these changes manually.' >&2; exit 1; fi
